subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and dark trousers, stepping off the curb to cross the old-town lane directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small satchel, wears canvas shoes; tousled hair catching the warm morning light, red jacket glowing
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, dark trousers, canvas shoes, small satchel
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Fair, smooth youthful skin warmed by the morning sun
subjects.facial_features: Round face, light brown hair, small features, rosy cheeks

subjects.description: Small parked cars lining the cobble-edged curbs of the old-town lane in the warm morning light
subjects.appearance_details: Compact European hatchbacks and small sedans in muted colors, warm sun glinting off their roofs beside blossoming trees
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A tree-lined residential lane in a European old-town district on a clear golden-hour spring morning. Rendered and stone townhouses with shuttered windows and flower boxes rise close along both sides of a narrow two-lane street whose asphalt is edged with old cobblestone gutters. Blossoming trees drop pale petals over the road; small parked cars line the cobbled curbs. Narrow sidewalks run beside the houses. Warm low sun from the east throws long soft shadows across the pavement and faded center markings.

lighting.direction: Low warm sun from the east, raking down the street
lighting.shadows: Long, soft, warm-edged shadows stretching across the road from trees and townhouses
lighting.illumination_effect: Golden low-angle glow warming the facades and blossoms; the child's red jacket catches the warm light against cool morning shade

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm ochre and cream facades, pale spring blossom, honeyed sunlight on cobble-edged asphalt, and a warm-lit red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Serene old-town spring morning calm heightened by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating small parked cars, blossoming trees, shuttered windows, cobblestone gutter lines

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus on the road ahead and the crossing child

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the narrow old-town residential lane in warm morning light.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking, decelerating as the nose dips slightly in the low golden sun.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the asphalt, partially faded, warmed by the low golden-hour sun
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the sunlit old-town lane, blossom trees and small parked cars along the cobble-edged curbs.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly amid long morning shadows.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely in the golden light.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a narrow European old-town lane in warm golden-hour light, blossom trees and small parked cars lining the cobble-edged street. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking, slowing with a slight forward pitch as long shadows stretch across the road. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary in the morning glow while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Quiet old-town morning sounds of songbirds and a distant church bell, the hum of the vehicle over cobble-edged asphalt, then firm tire and brake friction as it decelerates, settling into a gentle idle with faint birdsong and rustling blossom.
